arts.ttl: “We must not get too carried away but the signs are positive” – Beppe Marotta on Inter Milan’s continued growth

arts.ttl: Marotta: ‘Atalanta are the hare, Inter the hunters’ in Scudetto chase
arts.sum: Inter President Beppe Marotta insists Atalanta are ‘among the prime candidates to win the Scudetto’...

arts.ttl: Thuram: ‘Winning with Inter is something that stays with you forever, I want another Scudetto in 2025’
